title: Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Medium Pile Roller Set | Includes 7" Tray, Frame, 1 x 7" Paint Roller Sleeve
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Roller Set, 7" What's Included Contents 1 x 7" Tray 1 x 7" Roller Sleeve 1 x 7" Roller Frame Get a Seriously Good finish... The Harris 7" roller set teams with other brushes, rollers and accessories in the Harris Seriously Good range. Seriously Good 7" Roller Set This Seriously Good 7" Roller set from Harris is for use when painting larger areas of walls & ceilings and woodwork. The roller is ideal for use on smooth & semi smooth surfaces, giving great results when used with emulsion paints. Extend Your Reach Looking to extend your reach? Simply attach the roller frame to a Harris Extension Pole with a push fit attachment. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier Harris Seriously Good Medium Pile Roller Set Walls & Ceilings, 9" Harris 102012005 Walls & Ceilings Paint, 7, Tray, Frame, 1 x 7 Roller Sleeve Harris 102012004 Walls & Ceilings Set, 9, Tray, Frame, 1 x 9 Roller Sleeve Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 7,116 4.5 out of 5 stars 641 4.5 out of 5 stars 138 Price £7.56 £ 7 . 56 £4.32 £ 4 . 32 £7.20 £ 7 . 20 Soft Grip Handle ✓ ✓ no data Ideal for painting Walls & Ceilings ✓ ✓ no data Replacement Sleeves available to purchase separately ✓ no data no data Sleeve Type Medium Pile Medium Pile no data Expected paint coverage compared to other Harris rollers Emulsion Emulsion no data Compatible with Harris Extension Poles ✓ ✓ no data
